---
title: "Dashboard Sante et Territoires"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
runtime: shiny
---

```{r global, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

required_packages <- c(
  "flexdashboard", "tidyverse", "tidytext", "wordcloud2", "leaflet",
  "sf", "DT", "plotly", "stopwords", "scales", "htmltools", "stringi"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[!vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste0(
      "Packages manquants: ", paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "),
      ". Installe-les avec install.packages()."
    )
  )
}

library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(wordcloud2)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(stopwords)
library(scales)
library(htmltools)
library(stringi)

read_finess <- function(path) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = path,
    delim = ";",
    col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
    trim_ws = TRUE,
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "Latin1"),
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    progress = FALSE
  )
}

normalize_token <- function(x) {
  x |>
    stringi::stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII") |>
    stringr::str_to_lower()
}

etab_raw <- read_finess("Data/finess_etablissements.csv") |>
  transmute(
    nofinesset,
    rs,
    rslongue,
    departement = coalesce(na_if(departement, ""), "NC"),
    libdepartement = coalesce(na_if(libdepartement, ""), "Non renseigne"),
    coordxet = readr::parse_double(coordxet, locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = ".")),
    coordyet = readr::parse_double(coordyet, locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = "."))
  )

activites <- read_finess("Data/finess_activites_soin.csv") |>
  transmute(nofinesset, libactivite)

disciplines <- read_finess("Data/finess_disciplines_enseignement.csv") |>
  transmute(nofinesset, libde)

materiels <- read_finess("Data/finess_materiels_lourds.csv") |>
  transmute(nofinesset, libeml)

etab <- etab_raw |>
  filter(!is.na(rs), rs != "")

etab_meta <- etab |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement)

# Dictionnaire de stop words FR + mots metier peu discriminants pour l'analyse thematique.
stop_fr <- tibble(token_norm = normalize_token(stopwords::stopwords("fr", source = "snowball")))
stop_custom <- tibble(
  token_norm = c(
    "centre", "centres", "etablissement", "etablissements", "site", "hopital",
    "hospitalier", "hospitaliere", "hospitalieres", "hospitaliers", "clinique",
    "groupement", "pole", "poles", "service", "services", "unite", "unites",
    "maison", "sante", "institut", "association", "residence", "foyer", "de",
    "du", "des", "d", "l", "le", "la", "les", "aux", "sur", "chez", "en"
  )
)
stop_all <- bind_rows(stop_fr, stop_custom) |> distinct()

etab_text <- etab |>
  mutate(
    text_clean = rs |>
      str_replace_all("['’]", " ") |>
      str_replace_all("[^[:alnum:] ]", " ")
  )

tokens <- etab_text |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement, text_clean) |>
  unnest_tokens(output = token, input = text_clean, token = "words") |>
  mutate(token_norm = normalize_token(token)) |>
  filter(
    str_detect(token_norm, "[a-z]"),
    str_length(token_norm) > 2
  ) |>
  anti_join(stop_all, by = "token_norm")

bigrams <- etab_text |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement, text_clean) |>
  unnest_tokens(output = bigram, input = text_clean, token = "ngrams", n = 2) |>
  separate(bigram, into = c("w1", "w2"), sep = " ", remove = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    w1 = normalize_token(w1),
    w2 = normalize_token(w2),
    bigram = paste(w1, w2)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(w1), !is.na(w2),
    str_detect(w1, "[a-z]"), str_detect(w2, "[a-z]"),
    str_length(w1) > 2, str_length(w2) > 2
  ) |>
  anti_join(stop_all |> rename(w1 = token_norm), by = "w1") |>
  anti_join(stop_all |> rename(w2 = token_norm), by = "w2")

top_themes_dep <- tokens |>
  count(departement, token_norm, sort = TRUE, name = "n") |>
  group_by(departement) |>
  slice_max(order_by = n, n = 8, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  summarise(
    top_themes = paste0(token_norm, " (", n, ")", collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dep_stats <- etab_meta |>
  count(departement, name = "n_etab") |>
  left_join(top_themes_dep, by = "departement") |>
  mutate(top_themes = replace_na(top_themes, "Pas de themes detectes"))

dep_geo <- sf::st_read("Data/departements.geojson", quiet = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    departement = stringr::str_to_upper(as.character(code)),
    libdepartement_geo = as.character(nom)
  ) |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  left_join(dep_stats, by = "departement") |>
  mutate(
    n_etab = replace_na(n_etab, 0L),
    top_themes = replace_na(top_themes, "Pas de themes detectes"),
    libdepartement = coalesce(libdepartement_geo, departement)
  )

dep_choices_tbl <- dep_geo |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  filter(n_etab > 0) |>
  distinct(departement, libdepartement) |>
  arrange(departement) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement))

dep_choices <- c("Tous" = "Tous", setNames(dep_choices_tbl$departement, dep_choices_tbl$label))
```

```{css}
.sidebar {
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.section.sidebar h3 {
  margin-top: 0.4em;
}

.leaflet-container {
  min-height: 460px;
}

.plotly html-widget,
.html-widget {
  width: 100% !important;
}
```

Column {.sidebar data-width=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Filtres

```{r}
selectInput(
  inputId = "dep_select",
  label = "Selection du departement",
  choices = dep_choices,
  selected = "Tous",
  selectize = TRUE
)

sliderInput(
  inputId = "top_n",
  label = "Nombre de termes / bigrammes affiches",
  min = 10,
  max = 80,
  value = 30,
  step = 5
)
```

### Lecture de l'axe

```{r}
HTML(
  "<b>Axe d'etude :</b> specialisation des territoires via la semantique des noms d'etablissements.<br>
  <b>Principe :</b> on nettoie les noms (tokenisation + stop words), puis on compare les themes dominants par departement."
)
```

### Indicateurs

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  filtered_etab <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    etab_meta
  } else {
    etab_meta |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  n <- nrow(filtered_etab)
  valueBox(
    value = format(n, big.mark = " "),
    caption = "Etablissements",
    icon = "fa-hospital",
    color = "primary"
  )
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  filtered_etab <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    etab_meta
  } else {
    etab_meta |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  ids <- filtered_etab$nofinesset
  n <- activites |> filter(nofinesset %in% ids) |> nrow()
  valueBox(
    value = format(n, big.mark = " "),
    caption = "Lignes d'activites de soin",
    icon = "fa-stethoscope",
    color = "success"
  )
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  filtered_etab <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    etab_meta
  } else {
    etab_meta |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  ids <- filtered_etab$nofinesset
  n_de <- disciplines |> filter(nofinesset %in% ids) |> nrow()
  n_eml <- materiels |> filter(nofinesset %in% ids) |> nrow()
  valueBox(
    value = paste0(format(n_de, big.mark = " "), " / ", format(n_eml, big.mark = " ")),
    caption = "Disciplines / Materiels lourds",
    icon = "fa-cogs",
    color = "warning"
  )
})
```

Column
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Nuage de mots interactif

```{r}
renderWordcloud2({
  filtered_tokens <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    tokens
  } else {
    tokens |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  wc <- filtered_tokens |>
    count(token_norm, sort = TRUE) |>
    slice_head(n = input$top_n) |>
    rename(word = token_norm, freq = n)

  validate(need(nrow(wc) > 0, "Aucun terme disponible pour ce filtre."))

  wordcloud2(
    data = wc,
    size = 0.7,
    minSize = 6,
    rotateRatio = 0.2,
    color = "random-dark",
    backgroundColor = "#f7f9fb"
  )
})
```

### Bigrammes dominants

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  filtered_bigrams <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    bigrams
  } else {
    bigrams |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  df <- filtered_bigrams |>
    count(bigram, sort = TRUE) |>
    slice_head(n = input$top_n) |>
    mutate(bigram = forcats::fct_reorder(bigram, n))

  validate(need(nrow(df) > 0, "Aucun bigramme disponible pour ce filtre."))

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = bigram, y = n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#2a9d8f") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Occurrences", title = "Bigrammes les plus frequents") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

  ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("x", "y"))
})
```

### Table de synthese textuelle

```{r}
renderDT({
  filtered_tokens <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    tokens
  } else {
    tokens |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  validate(need(nrow(filtered_tokens) > 0, "Aucune donnee textuelle pour ce filtre."))

  filtered_tokens |>
    count(token_norm, sort = TRUE, name = "frequence") |>
    slice_head(n = input$top_n) |>
    datatable(
      rownames = FALSE,
      options = list(pageLength = 10, dom = "tip"),
      colnames = c("terme", "frequence")
    )
})
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Carte Leaflet: volume d'etablissements et themes territoriaux

```{r}
renderLeaflet({
  d <- if (input$dep_select == "Tous") {
    dep_geo
  } else {
    dep_geo |> filter(departement == input$dep_select)
  }

  validate(need(nrow(d) > 0, "Aucune geometrie disponible pour ce departement."))

  pal <- colorBin(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    domain = dep_geo$n_etab,
    bins = 7,
    na.color = "#f0f0f0"
  )

  leaflet(d) |>
    addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
    addPolygons(
      fillColor = ~pal(n_etab),
      weight = 1,
      color = "#4f5d75",
      opacity = 1,
      fillOpacity = 0.75,
      smoothFactor = 0.2,
      label = ~paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement, " : ", format(n_etab, big.mark = " "), " etablissements"),
      popup = ~paste0(
        "<b>", departement, " - ", libdepartement, "</b><br>",
        "Etablissements: ", format(n_etab, big.mark = " "), "<br><br>",
        "<b>Themes dominants:</b><br>",
        htmltools::htmlEscape(top_themes)
      )
    ) |>
    addLegend(
      "bottomright",
      pal = pal,
      values = dep_geo$n_etab,
      title = "Nombre d'etablissements",
      opacity = 0.85
    )
})
```
